Monitor equipment in ATEX zones without entering them

Detect faults and cut energy waste across pumps, fans, compressors, and centrifuges in your chemical plants. SAM4 installs in the motor control cabinet, safely outside hazardous areas.

Deployed at DuPont, DSM-Firmenich, OCI Nitrogen, and more. €121k/yr in energy savings and €90k in production loss prevented from deployed pilots. See results ↓

See How It Works Request a Demo

Trusted by leaders in chemicals and materials

The challenge

ATEX zones and continuous processes leave little room for surprises

Chemical plants run 24/7 in explosive atmospheres where equipment can't be easily instrumented. SEVESO regulations and safety compliance add pressure to prevent unplanned downtime. When a compressor or reactor pump fails, the cost is lost batches, safety incidents, and regulatory exposure.

Hazardous area monitoring

ATEX-rated zones prohibit many sensor types. SAM4 installs on power cables in the motor control cabinet, no entry into classified zones required.

Continuous process disruption

An unplanned pump or compressor failure can stop an entire production line. SAM4 gives weeks-to-months advance warning so you can schedule repairs during planned STOs (Shutdowns, Turnarounds, Outages).

Energy waste in rotating equipment

Oversized pumps, inefficient blowers, and poorly matched drives waste 5-35% of energy. SAM4 identifies waste with real-time performance data.

What we monitor

Critical assets in chemical manufacturing

Pumps

Process, transfer, and circulation pumps with cavitation, seal wear, and efficiency monitoring across all voltage ranges.

Learn more →

Compressors

Gas and air compressors with bearing, coupling, and driver fault detection for continuous chemical processes. Monitor motor-pump and motor-compressor sets across all duty cycles.

Learn more →

Fans & Blowers

Ventilation fans and process blowers with energy optimisation and early degradation alerts.

Learn more →

Don’t see your asset?

We co-develop SAM4 for new use cases. Bring yours. 5 partner slots open for 2026.

Explore the programme →

Deployments

Results from chemical industry deployments

$90k Production loss prevented (heated godet roll)
€121k/yr Energy savings from pump rightsizing
90.8% Detection rate (Jan 2024 – Feb 2026)
5-35% Energy waste identified

These figures come from initial chemical industry deployments. Platform-wide accuracy (90.8% detection rate on core assets, 0.32% false communication rate) is measured across the full fleet. Chemicals-specific accuracy will be published as deployment volume grows.

Proof

Chemicals case studies

$90k Production loss prevented

Early warning on heated godet roll prevents $90k loss

SAM4 detected a developing fault in a heated godet roll used in synthetic fibre production, preventing a $90k production loss.

Read case study →
€121k/yr Annual energy savings

Rightsizing booster pumps to save €121k per year

Real-time pump performance data revealed oversized pumps wasting energy. Rightsizing saved €121k annually.

Read case study →
1 Cavitation event caught

Detecting cavitation in anolyte pumps

SAM4 identified cavitation in a critical anolyte pump before it caused damage, enabling timely intervention.

Read case study →

How it works

Simple installation, immediate insights

SAM4 installs inside the motor control cabinet. No sensors in hazardous areas, no ATEX certification needed, no process interruption. Works with your P&ID documentation for asset identification.

  1. Install in the MCC Clip-on current and voltage sensors attach to existing wiring in the motor control cabinet. Takes 60–90 minutes per asset. Compatible with existing LOTO procedures.
  2. Connect to SAM4 cloud The DAQ device samples at 20 kHz and sends data securely to the SAM4 platform for AI analysis.
  3. Get actionable alerts Receive predictive alerts weeks to months before failure, with fault type, severity, and recommended action. Actionable for routine maintenance and planned turnarounds.
See how it installs →

From one reactor train to plant-wide coverage

Start with the sealed pumps and ATEX-zone assets you can't wire. Once SAM4 hardware is in the MCC, monitoring every downstream motor is a configuration step, no additional instrumentation required.

See How It Scales

Not sure yet?

Start with a paid validation

SAM4-X lets you prove the technology on your assets before committing to a fleet-wide contract. Fixed scope. Fixed price. Real results on your equipment, not a generic demo.

Learn About SAM4-X →

“These pumps were always online with no redundancy. SAM4 gave us the confidence we needed.”
